# Phase log: build-runner repeats

Iteration 1:
  $ bash scripts/build.sh --release
  build ok

Iteration 2:
  $ bash scripts/build.sh --release
  build ok

Iteration 3:
  $ bash scripts/build.sh --debug
  build ok

Iteration 4:
  $ bash scripts/build.sh --release
  build ok

Iteration 5:
  $ bash scripts/build.sh --release
  build ok
